TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_abas
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: sikawmapaiku haw pakunku tu zana qmudu tu biat.
S.PHON: sikawmapaiku haw pakunku tu z~rana qmuɮu tu βiat.
S.FORM: sikawmapaiku haw pakunku tu zana qmudu tu biat.
S.PHON: sikawmapaiku haw pakunku tu z~rana qmuɮu tu βiat.
S.TRANSL: 我要講一個關於養青蛙的故事.
I'm going to tell a story, starting from keeping a frog.

S.FORM: yau sunis a zau qmudu tu biyat qmudu tu wasu nani.
S.PHON: jau sunis a z~rau qmuɮu tu βijat qmuɮu tu wasu nani.
S.FORM: yau sunis a zau qmudu tu biyat qmudu tu wasu nani.
S.PHON: jau sunis a z~rau qmuɮu tu βijat qmuɮu tu wasu nani.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩養了一隻青蛙和一隻狗.
There is a child who keeps a frog and a dog.

S.FORM: taytaan na sunis a zau biatna tapeRaskuan atu wasu unay nani.
S.PHON: tajtaan na sunis a z~rau βiatna tapəʁaskuan atu wasu unaj nani.
S.FORM: taytaan na sunis a zau biatna tapeRaskuan atu wasu unay nani.
S.PHON: tajtaan na sunis a z~rau βiatna tapəʁaskuan atu wasu unaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩看著他在瓶子裡的青蛙,還有狗.
This child looks at his frog in the bottle and that dog.

S.FORM: mlizaq tmayta tu wasu biatna sRi wasu a yau tu.
S.PHON: mriz~raq tmajta tu wasu βiatna sʁi wasu a jau tu.
S.FORM: mlizaq tmayta tu wasu biatna sRi wasu a yau tu.
S.PHON: mriz~raq tmajta tu wasu βiatna sʁi wasu a jau tu.

TRANSL.notes: 看著他的青蛙和狗,很高興,然後… (FLIPPING THE PAGE)

S.TRANSL: 看著他的青蛙和狗,很高興,然後…
Looking at his frog and that dog, he feels happy, and...

S.FORM: tu tuRabiti nani maynepti ya sunis a zau.
S.PHON: tu tuʁaβiti nani majnəpti ja sunis a z~rau.
S.FORM: tu tuRabiti nani maynepti ya sunis a zau.
S.PHON: tu tuʁaβiti nani majnəpti ja sunis a z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 到了晚上,這個小孩睡著了.
And when the night falls, this child also falls asleep.

S.FORM: mangu mRaRiw a biatna sayza ya maynep a sunis a zau qaRatuRabi.
S.PHON: maŋu mʁaʁiw a βiatna sajz~ra ja majnəp a sunis a z~rau qaʁatuʁaβi.
S.FORM: mangu mRaRiw a biatna sayza ya maynep a sunis a zau qaRatuRabi.
S.PHON: maŋu mʁaʁiw a βiatna sajz~ra ja majnəp a sunis a z~rau qaʁatuʁaβi.

TRANSL.notes: 結果他的青蛙跑走了,可能(因為)小孩晚上在睡覺.

S.TRANSL: 結果他的青蛙跑走了,可能 小孩晚上在睡覺.

TRANSL.notes: And it turns out that his frog runs away, perhaps (because) this child has fallen asleep in the late evening.

S.TRANSL: And it turns out that his frog runs away, perhaps this child has fallen asleep in the late evening.

S.FORM: tu tabRabi masuat nani taytaanna tapuduqan a biyat a yau nani maiti.
S.PHON: tu taβʁaβi masuat nani tajtaanna tapuɮuqan a βijat a jau nani maiti.
S.FORM: tu tabRabi masuat nani taytaanna tapuduqan a biyat a yau nani maiti.
S.PHON: tu taβʁaβi masuat nani tajtaanna tapuɮuqan a βijat a jau nani maiti.
S.TRANSL: 早上醒來後,他看瓶子裡的青蛙,結果不見了.
And after waking up in the morning, he looks into the bottle for that frog, but it is gone?!

S.FORM: ou nianti biatku zinna sunis a zau.
S.PHON: *u nianti βiatku z~rinna sunis a z~rau.
S.FORM: ou nianti biatku zinna sunis a zau.
S.PHON: *u nianti βiatku z~rinna sunis a z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩說,oh,我的青蛙在哪裡?
'Oh, where is my frog?,' said this child.

S.FORM: tu wiyati kmilim kmilimti sunis a zau tu biatna nani.
S.PHON: tu wijati kmirim kmirimti sunis a z~rau tu βiatna nani.
S.FORM: tu wiyati kmilim kmilimti sunis a zau tu biatna nani.
S.PHON: tu wijati kmirim kmirimti sunis a z~rau tu βiatna nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩去找,去找他的青蛙.
So this child goes searching, searching for his frog.

S.FORM: ou pasi yau taRasuRanna na zpu na kucu zinna sayza na sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: *u pasi jau taʁasuʁanna na z~rpu na kuʦu z~rinna sajz~ra na sunis a z~rau nani.
S.FORM: ou pasi yau taRasuRanna na zpu na kucu zinna sayza na sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: *u pasi jau taʁasuʁanna na z~rpu na kuʦu z~rinna sajz~ra na sunis a z~rau nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩可能想說,可能在我的拖鞋,鞋子裡面.
This child thinks, 'Ooh, it's probably inside the shoes.'

S.FORM: wa wiyati biquluannati ya zpuna amagucuna sayza 'u kmilim tu biat nani.
S.PHON: wa wijati βiquruannati ja z~rpuna amaguʦuna sajz~ra ʔu kmirim tu βiat nani.
S.FORM: wa wiyati biquluannati ya zpuna amagucuna sayza 'u kmilim tu biat nani.
S.PHON: wa wijati βiquruannati ja z~rpuna amaguʦuna sajz~ra ʔu kmirim tu βiat nani.
S.TRANSL: 他翻他的鞋子,或可能是他的雨鞋,要找青蛙.
He goes turning over his shoes, or his rain boots perhaps, to search for the frog.

S.FORM: sRi wasu a yau pasi yau tapuduqan ya ya biat a zau zinna sayza na wasu a zau nani.
S.PHON: sʁi wasu a jau pasi jau tapuɮuqan ja ja βiat a z~rau z~rinna sajz~ra na wasu a z~rau nani.
S.FORM: sRi wasu a yau pasi yau tapuduqan ya ya biat a zau zinna sayza na wasu a zau nani.
S.PHON: sʁi wasu a jau pasi jau tapuɮuqan ja ja βiat a z~rau z~rinna sajz~ra na wasu a z~rau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗想說可能在瓶子裡.

TRANSL.notes: As for the dog, it thinks that (the frog) is probably in the bottle.

S.TRANSL: As for the dog, it thinks that is probably in the bottle.

S.FORM: susuRannati na uRuna ya peRasku a yau qnizuanan na biyat.
S.PHON: susuʁannati na uʁuna ja pəʁasku a jau qniz~ruanan na βijat.
S.FORM: susuRannati na uRuna ya peRasku a yau qnizuanan na biyat.
S.PHON: susuʁannati na uʁuna ja pəʁasku a jau qniz~ruanan na βijat.
S.TRANSL: 狗把頭鑽進瓶子裡,青蛙曾住過的地方.
So it squeezes his head into the bottle, where the frog once resided.

S.FORM: tu Raynguti alaan Raynguti 'etusan ya uRu na wasu a zau.
S.PHON: tu ʁajŋuti araan ʁajŋuti ʔətusan ja uʁu na wasu a z~rau.
S.FORM: tu Raynguti alaan Raynguti 'etusan ya uRu na wasu a zau.
S.PHON: tu ʁajŋuti araan ʁajŋuti ʔətusan ja uʁu na wasu a z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 狗不能拿..不能把頭拔出來.
And the dog can't take, can't pull out its head.

S.FORM: tu wiyati kmilim tu biat a yau ya sunis a yau masulun tu wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: tu wijati kmirim tu βiat a jau ja sunis a jau masurun tu wasu a jau nani.
S.FORM: tu wiyati kmilim tu biat a yau ya sunis a yau masulun tu wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: tu wijati kmirim tu βiat a jau ja sunis a jau masurun tu wasu a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩去找青蛙,跟狗一起.
And then that child goes searching for the frog, accompanied by his dog.

S.FORM: mangu yau sikubuanna na wasu a yau a peRasku a qnizuanan na biat a yau.
S.PHON: maŋu jau sikuβuanna na wasu a jau a pəʁasku a qniz~ruanan na βiat a jau.
S.FORM: mangu yau sikubuanna na wasu a yau a peRasku a qnizuanan na biat a yau.
S.PHON: maŋu jau sikuβuanna na wasu a jau a pəʁasku a qniz~ruanan na βiat a jau.
S.TRANSL: 結果狗把瓶子戴在頭上,青蛙曾經住過的地方.
It turns out that the dog is wears the bottle on its head, where the frog once resided.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani yau qumRas sunis a yau tu biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani jau qumʁas sunis a jau tu βiat a jau nani.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani yau qumRas sunis a yau tu biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani jau qumʁas sunis a jau tu βiat a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這裡,小孩在叫青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it (i.e. the story) comes here), the child is yelling out for the frog.

S.TRANSL: At this point comes here), the child is yelling out for the frog.

S.FORM: yau qaya wasu a yau mRaytungtunguz kmilim qaya tu biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau qaja wasu a jau mʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r kmirim qaja tu βiat a jau nani.
S.FORM: yau qaya wasu a yau mRaytungtunguz kmilim qaya tu biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau qaja wasu a jau mʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r kmirim qaja tu βiat a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 狗也在叫,也在找青蛙.
The dog also keeps barking and barking and search for the frog.

S.FORM: mangu tmibuqti nizi tadengatanna ya wasu a yau.
S.PHON: maŋu tmiβuqti niz~ri taɮəŋatanna ja wasu a jau.
S.FORM: mangu tmibuqti nizi tadengatanna ya wasu a yau.
S.PHON: maŋu tmiβuqti niz~ri taɮəŋatanna ja wasu a jau.
S.TRANSL: 結果狗從窗戶掉下去.
And it turns out that the dog falls down off the window.

S.FORM: masulun tu lazat a yau qumRas ta biyat a yau nani tmibuqti wasu a yau tu.
S.PHON: masurun tu raz~rat a jau qumʁas ta βijat a jau nani tmiβuqti wasu a jau tu.
S.FORM: masulun tu lazat a yau qumRas ta biyat a yau nani tmibuqti wasu a yau tu.
S.PHON: masurun tu raz~rat a jau qumʁas ta βijat a jau nani tmiβuqti wasu a jau tu.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗跟著那個人,叫青蛙,然後掉下去了.
When following the man to yell out for the frog, the dog falls down, and..

S.FORM: mabedungti ya peRasku a yau snikubu na wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: maβəɮuŋti ja pəʁasku a jau snikuβu na wasu a jau nani.
S.FORM: mabedungti ya peRasku a yau snikubu na wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: maβəɮuŋti ja pəʁasku a jau snikuβu na wasu a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 狗戴在頭上的瓶子破了.

TRANSL.notes: The bottle that the dog wears on its head breaks (into pieces).

S.TRANSL: The bottle that the dog wears on its head breaks .

S.FORM: syaziti tazian maiti peRasku a yau.
S.PHON: sjaz~riti taz~rian maiti pəʁasku a jau.
S.FORM: syaziti tazian maiti peRasku a yau.
S.PHON: sjaz~riti taz~rian maiti pəʁasku a jau.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,瓶子沒有了.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), the bottle is gone (off the dog's head).

S.TRANSL: At this point , the bottle is gone .

S.FORM: taytaannati na sunis a zau nani maiti ya snikubu na wasu kutu peRasku a yau zinna tu alaannati na sunis a zau bawa' ya wasu zau.
S.PHON: tajtaannati na sunis a z~rau nani maiti ja snikuβu na wasu kutu pəʁasku a jau z~rinna tu araannati na sunis a z~rau βawaʔ ja wasu z~rau.
S.FORM: taytaannati na sunis a zau nani maiti ya snikubu na wasu kutu peRasku a yau zinna tu alaannati na sunis a zau bawa' ya wasu zau.
S.PHON: tajtaannati na sunis a z~rau nani maiti ja snikuβu na wasu kutu pəʁasku a jau z~rinna tu araannati na sunis a z~rau βawaʔ ja wasu z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 看到小狗戴在頭上的瓶子不見了,這個小孩抱起了狗.

TRANSL.notes: When seeing the bottle that the dog wears gone (off the dog's head), this child holds up the dog.

S.TRANSL: When seeing the bottle that the dog wears gone , this child holds up the dog.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani yauti qumRas sunis a yau ta biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani jauti qumʁas sunis a jau ta βiat a jau nani.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani yauti qumRas sunis a yau ta biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani jauti qumʁas sunis a jau ta βiat a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,小孩在叫青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), the child is yelling out for the frog.

S.TRANSL: At this point , the child is yelling out for the frog.

S.FORM: wasu a zau na yau Raytungtunguz qumRas tu biat a yau sayza nani.
S.PHON: wasu a z~rau na jau ʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r qumʁas tu βiat a jau sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: wasu a zau na yau Raytungtunguz qumRas tu biat a yau sayza nani.
S.PHON: wasu a z~rau na jau ʁajtuŋtuŋuz~r qumʁas tu βiat a jau sajz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙一直叫,可能在叫青蛙.
As for the dog, it keeps barking and barking, yelling out for the frog perhaps.

S.FORM: taytaannati na tuliq a yau sayza ya lazat a zau atu wasu a zau nani mzazukatti tuliq a yau ngil qaRat tu lazat a zau atu sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: tajtaannati na turiq a jau sajz~ra ja raz~rat a z~rau atu wasu a z~rau nani mz~raz~rukatti turiq a jau ŋir qaʁat tu raz~rat a z~rau atu sunis a z~rau nani.
S.FORM: taytaannati na tuliq a yau sayza ya lazat a zau atu wasu a zau nani mzazukatti tuliq a yau ngil qaRat tu lazat a zau atu sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: tajtaannati na turiq a jau sajz~ra ja raz~rat a z~rau atu wasu a z~rau nani mz~raz~rukatti turiq a jau ŋir qaʁat tu raz~rat a z~rau atu sunis a z~rau nani.
S.TRANSL: 這些蜜蜂看到小孩和狗,就一直跑出來,想要咬這個人和這個小孩.

TRANSL.notes: Perhaps because those wasps see this person and this dog, they keep coming out (of their nest), wanting to sting this person and this child.

S.TRANSL: Perhaps because those wasps see this person and this dog, they keep coming out , wanting to sting this person and this child.

S.FORM: maytisti sunis a zau.
S.PHON: majtisti sunis a z~rau.
S.FORM: maytisti sunis a zau.
S.PHON: majtisti sunis a z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩很害怕.

TRANSL.notes: This child is afraid (of the wasps).

S.TRANSL: This child is afraid .

S.FORM: tu syazi tazian nani makenti tmayta tu tuliq a yau nani.
S.PHON: tu sjaz~ri taz~rian nani makənti tmajta tu turiq a jau nani.
S.FORM: tu syazi tazian nani makenti tmayta tu tuliq a yau nani.
S.PHON: tu sjaz~ri taz~rian nani makənti tmajta tu turiq a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,真的看到蜜蜂了.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), (he) really sees those wasps.

S.TRANSL: At this point , really sees those wasps.

S.FORM: wi ta babaw tuliq a yau.
S.PHON: wi ta βaβaw turiq a jau.
S.FORM: wi ta babaw tuliq a yau.
S.PHON: wi ta βaβaw turiq a jau.
S.TRANSL: 那些蜜蜂在上面.
Those wasps are high above.

S.FORM: qmubetti ya sunis a zau qnaytisan tu tuliq a yau nani.
S.PHON: qmuβətti ja sunis a z~rau qnajtisan tu turiq a jau nani.
S.FORM: qmubetti ya sunis a zau qnaytisan tu tuliq a yau nani.
S.PHON: qmuβətti ja sunis a z~rau qnajtisan tu turiq a jau nani.

TRANSL.notes: 小孩蹲下來,(因為)怕蜜蜂.

S.TRANSL: 小孩蹲下來, 怕蜜蜂.
Afraid of those wasps, this child crouches down.

S.FORM: yau wasu a yau mRaytunguz.
S.PHON: jau wasu a jau mʁajtuŋuz~r.
S.FORM: yau wasu a yau mRaytunguz.
S.PHON: jau wasu a jau mʁajtuŋuz~r.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗在叫.
That dog is barking.

S.FORM: pasya babaw mRaytunguz tu tuliq a zau ya sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: pasja βaβaw mʁajtuŋuz~r tu turiq a z~rau ja sunis a z~rau nani.
S.FORM: pasya babaw mRaytunguz tu tuliq a zau ya sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: pasja βaβaw mʁajtuŋuz~r tu turiq a z~rau ja sunis a z~rau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩向上對蜜蜂叫.
This child is barking up at the wasps.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani maytisti sayza sunis a zau tu tuliq a zau muRingti.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani majtisti sajz~ra sunis a z~rau tu turiq a z~rau muʁiŋti.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani maytisti sayza sunis a zau tu tuliq a zau muRingti.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani majtisti sajz~ra sunis a z~rau tu turiq a z~rau muʁiŋti.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,小孩怕這些蜜蜂,就哭了.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), this child has cried up, perhaps because he is afraid of these wasps.

S.TRANSL: At this point , this child has cried up, perhaps because he is afraid of these wasps.

S.FORM: taytaanna nani yau a wasuna mutun yau a mutun yau a wasu miza mRaytunguz tu tuliq a yau.
S.PHON: tajtaanna nani jau a wasuna mutun jau a mutun jau a wasu miz~ra mʁajtuŋuz~r tu turiq a jau.
S.FORM: taytaanna nani yau a wasuna mutun yau a mutun yau a wasu miza mRaytunguz tu tuliq a yau.
S.PHON: tajtaanna nani jau a wasuna mutun jau a mutun jau a wasu miz~ra mʁajtuŋuz~r tu turiq a jau.
S.TRANSL: 他看到有他的狗…老鼠…有老鼠有狗,在做…對蜜蜂叫.

TRANSL.notes: When he looks (up), (he finds) his dog… the mouse.., the mouse and the dog are doing, uh, barking at those wasps.

S.TRANSL: When he looks , his dog… the mouse.., the mouse and the dog are doing, uh, barking at those wasps.

S.FORM: tu muRing a sunis a yau.
S.PHON: tu muʁiŋ a sunis a jau.
S.FORM: tu muRing a sunis a yau.
S.PHON: tu muʁiŋ a sunis a jau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在哭.
And the child is crying.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani tmibuqti ya tuliq a yau nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani tmiβuqti ja turiq a jau nani.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani tmibuqti ya tuliq a yau nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani tmiβuqti ja turiq a jau nani.

TRANSL.notes: 到了這邊,蜂(窩)掉下來了.

S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,蜂 掉下來了.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), the (nest of) wasps has fallen down.

S.TRANSL: At this point , the wasps has fallen down.

S.FORM: maytisti ya wasu a yau ngilti zaqis tu paRin qnaytisan tu tuliq a yau nani.
S.PHON: majtisti ja wasu a jau ŋirti z~raqis tu paʁin qnajtisan tu turiq a jau nani.
S.FORM: maytisti ya wasu a yau ngilti zaqis tu paRin qnaytisan tu tuliq a yau nani.
S.PHON: majtisti ja wasu a jau ŋirti z~raqis tu paʁin qnajtisan tu turiq a jau nani.

TRANSL.notes: 那隻狗很害怕,(所以)想爬上樹,(因為)怕蜜蜂.

S.TRANSL: 那隻狗很害怕, 想爬上樹, 怕蜜蜂.

TRANSL.notes: That dog is afraid, (so) it wants to climb up to the tree, being afraid of those wasps.

S.TRANSL: That dog is afraid, it wants to climb up to the tree, being afraid of those wasps.

S.FORM: yau a mutun a yau qaya tmayta tu wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau a mutun a jau qaja tmajta tu wasu a jau nani.
S.FORM: yau a mutun a yau qaya tmayta tu wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau a mutun a jau qaja tmajta tu wasu a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個老鼠也看著那隻狗.
There is also the mouse watching the dog.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani taytaanna na sunis a yau mzaqis tu paRin a sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani tajtaanna na sunis a jau mz~raqis tu paʁin a sunis a z~rau nani.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani taytaanna na sunis a yau mzaqis tu paRin a sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani tajtaanna na sunis a jau mz~raqis tu paʁin a sunis a z~rau nani.
S.TRANSL: 來到這邊,小孩看到…這個小孩爬上樹.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), that child sees.., this child climbs up to the tree.

S.TRANSL: At this point , that child sees.., this child climbs up to the tree.

S.FORM: yau a tangan na paRin a yau.
S.PHON: jau a taŋan na paʁin a jau.
S.FORM: yau a tangan na paRin a yau.
S.PHON: jau a taŋan na paʁin a jau.
S.TRANSL: 樹有洞.
There is a hole on the tree.

S.FORM: pasi yau tazian ya biatku zinna sayza na sunis a zau pankelanna ya tanganna mai ya biat a yau.
S.PHON: pasi jau taz~rian ja βiatku z~rinna sajz~ra na sunis a z~rau pankəranna ja taŋanna mai ja βiat a jau.
S.FORM: pasi yau tazian ya biatku zinna sayza na sunis a zau pankelanna ya tanganna mai ya biat a yau.
S.PHON: pasi jau taz~rian ja βiatku z~rinna sajz~ra na sunis a z~rau pankəranna ja taŋanna mai ja βiat a jau.

TRANSL.notes: 這個小孩可能想說,我的青蛙可能在這裡,(所以)它往洞裡瞧,(可是)青蛙不在那裡.

S.TRANSL: 這個小孩可能想說,我的青蛙可能在這裡, 它往洞裡瞧, 青蛙不在那裡.

TRANSL.notes: This child perhaps thinks, "My frog is probably here," (so) he peeks into the hole, but the frog is not there.

S.TRANSL: This child perhaps thinks, "My frog is probably here," he peeks into the hole, but the frog is not there.

S.FORM: tu syaziti tazian nani au zaqispaita tu paRin zinna sayza na sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: tu sjaz~riti taz~rian nani au z~raqispaita tu paʁin z~rinna sajz~ra na sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: tu syaziti tazian nani au zaqispaita tu paRin zinna sayza na sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: tu sjaz~riti taz~rian nani au z~raqispaita tu paʁin z~rinna sajz~ra na sunis a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,小孩可能說,我們要爬樹.
And when it comes here, perhaps the child says, "We're going to climb up to the tree."

S.FORM: pamengti mzukat ya ku a zau.
S.PHON: paməŋti mz~rukat ja ku a z~rau.
S.FORM: pamengti mzukat ya ku a zau.
S.PHON: paməŋti mz~rukat ja ku a z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 突然,貓頭鷹出來了.

TRANSL.notes: Suddenly (out of the hole) comes an owl.

S.TRANSL: Suddenly comes an owl.

S.FORM: tu maytisti ya sunis a zau tu ku a zau sayza tu tmibuqti sunis a zau.
S.PHON: tu majtisti ja sunis a z~rau tu ku a z~rau sajz~ra tu tmiβuqti sunis a z~rau.
S.FORM: tu maytisti ya sunis a zau tu ku a zau sayza tu tmibuqti sunis a zau.
S.PHON: tu majtisti ja sunis a z~rau tu ku a z~rau sajz~ra tu tmiβuqti sunis a z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩可能怕這個貓頭鷹,就掉下去了.

TRANSL.notes: And perhaps because the child is afraid of this owl, he falls down (off the tree).

S.TRANSL: And perhaps because the child is afraid of this owl, he falls down .

S.FORM: wasu a yau qaya nani wiyati mRaRiw tu tanuzan na tuliq ya wasu a zau.
S.PHON: wasu a jau qaja nani wijati mʁaʁiw tu tanuz~ran na turiq ja wasu a z~rau.
S.FORM: wasu a yau qaya nani wiyati mRaRiw tu tanuzan na tuliq ya wasu a zau.
S.PHON: wasu a jau qaja nani wijati mʁaʁiw tu tanuz~ran na turiq ja wasu a z~rau.

TRANSL.notes: 狗也跑走了,(因為)它被蜜蜂追.

S.TRANSL: 狗也跑走了, 它被蜜蜂追.
The dog also runs away, for it's being chased by the wasps.

S.FORM: syazi tazian qaya na zaqispaiku tu zaqispaiku tabubungaRan zin na sunis a zau sayza nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian qaja na z~raqispaiku tu z~raqispaiku taβuβuŋaʁan z~rin na sunis a z~rau sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: syazi tazian qaya na zaqispaiku tu zaqispaiku tabubungaRan zin na sunis a zau sayza nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian qaja na z~raqispaiku tu z~raqispaiku taβuβuŋaʁan z~rin na sunis a z~rau sajz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,小孩可能想說,我要爬樹.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here) again, perhaps this child thinks, "I'm going to climb eh…, I'm going to climb up to the rock."

S.TRANSL: At this point again, perhaps this child thinks, "I'm going to climb eh…, I'm going to climb up to the rock."

S.FORM: HIGHPITCHtaytaanna naniHIGHPITCH yau tuliq 'a ku a yau tmanuz tu sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: highpitʦhtajtaanna nanihighpitʦh jau turiq ʔa ku a jau tmanuz~r tu sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: HIGHPITCHtaytaanna naniHIGHPITCH yau tuliq 'a ku a yau tmanuz tu sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: highpitʦhtajtaanna nanihighpitʦh jau turiq ʔa ku a jau tmanuz~r tu sunis a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩看到,有蜜蜂…貓頭鷹在追那個小孩.

TRANSL.notes: When the child looks (up), (he finds) the wasps, uh, the owl chasing him.

S.TRANSL: When the child looks , the wasps, uh, the owl chasing him.

S.FORM: wiyati mRaRiw sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: wijati mʁaʁiw sunis a z~rau nani.
S.FORM: wiyati mRaRiw sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: wijati mʁaʁiw sunis a z~rau nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩跑走.
And this child runs away.

S.FORM: syazi tazian tausiqan na buRang nani mzaqisti qnaytisan tu ku a yau.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian tausiqan na βuʁaŋ nani mz~raqisti qnajtisan tu ku a jau.
S.FORM: syazi tazian tausiqan na buRang nani mzaqisti qnaytisan tu ku a yau.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian tausiqan na βuʁaŋ nani mz~raqisti qnajtisan tu ku a jau.

TRANSL.notes: 到了一個石頭,(小孩)爬上去,(因為)怕貓頭鷹.

S.TRANSL: 到了一個石頭, 爬上去, 怕貓頭鷹.
When he comes to a rock, he climbs up to it for fear of the owl.

S.FORM: pamengti yau mzukat a siRmuq a zau tu azuti uzunganna.
S.PHON: paməŋti jau mz~rukat a siʁmuq a z~rau tu az~ruti uz~ruŋanna.
S.FORM: pamengti yau mzukat a siRmuq a zau tu azuti uzunganna.
S.PHON: paməŋti jau mz~rukat a siʁmuq a z~rau tu az~ruti uz~ruŋanna.
S.TRANSL: 突然,鹿出來了,好像扛在背上.

TRANSL.notes: All of a sudden, (out from behind the rock) comes a deer, and it is like, (the deer) carries (the child) on its back.

S.TRANSL: All of a sudden, comes a deer, and it is like, carries on its back.

S.FORM: yau tayan ta babaw na buRang a sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: jau tajan ta βaβaw na βuʁaŋ a sunis a z~rau nani.
S.FORM: yau tayan ta babaw na buRang a sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: jau tajan ta βaβaw na βuʁaŋ a sunis a z~rau nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩在石頭上面.
The child is there on the top of the rock.

S.FORM: pamengti yau tauRuanna na siRmuq mzaqis a sunis a zau.
S.PHON: paməŋti jau tauʁuanna na siʁmuq mz~raqis a sunis a z~rau.
S.FORM: pamengti yau tauRuanna na siRmuq mzaqis a sunis a zau.
S.PHON: paməŋti jau tauʁuanna na siʁmuq mz~raqis a sunis a z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 突然,小孩爬到鹿的頭上.
All of a sudden, onto the head of the deer climbs this child.

S.FORM: tu wiyati mRaRiw a siRmuq a yau nani yauti tauRuan na siRmuq a sunis a zau uzungan na siRmuq.
S.PHON: tu wijati mʁaʁiw a siʁmuq a jau nani jauti tauʁuan na siʁmuq a sunis a z~rau uz~ruŋan na siʁmuq.
S.FORM: tu wiyati mRaRiw a siRmuq a yau nani yauti tauRuan na siRmuq a sunis a zau uzungan na siRmuq.
S.PHON: tu wijati mʁaʁiw a siʁmuq a jau nani jauti tauʁuan na siʁmuq a sunis a z~rau uz~ruŋan na siʁmuq.
S.TRANSL: 鹿跑走了,小孩在鹿的頭上,被鹿扛在背上.
And then the deer runs away, and the child is on the head of the deer, carried by the deer on its back.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani mau nizi tauRuan na siRmuq a sunis a zau nani mangu tmibuqti.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani mau niz~ri tauʁuan na siʁmuq a sunis a z~rau nani maŋu tmiβuqti.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani mau nizi tauRuan na siRmuq a sunis a zau nani mangu tmibuqti.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani mau niz~ri tauʁuan na siʁmuq a sunis a z~rau nani maŋu tmiβuqti.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,小孩原本在鹿的頭上,結果掉下來了.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), the child previously on the head of the deer turns out to fall down.

S.TRANSL: At this point , the child previously on the head of the deer turns out to fall down.

S.FORM: yau tmibuqti ya sunis a zau zinna sayza na siRmuq a zau nani.
S.PHON: jau tmiβuqti ja sunis a z~rau z~rinna sajz~ra na siʁmuq a z~rau nani.
S.FORM: yau tmibuqti ya sunis a zau zinna sayza na siRmuq a zau nani.
S.PHON: jau tmiβuqti ja sunis a z~rau z~rinna sajz~ra na siʁmuq a z~rau nani.
S.TRANSL: 鹿可能想說,小孩掉下去了.
Perhaps the deer thinks, "The child is falling down."

S.FORM: yau a wasuna qaya 'u yau a mutun cye ke su.
S.PHON: jau a wasuna qaja ʔu jau a mutun ʦjə kə su.
S.FORM: yau a wasuna qaya 'u yau a mutun cye ke su.
S.PHON: jau a wasuna qaja ʔu jau a mutun ʦjə kə su.

TRANSL.notes: 他的狗也(掉下去了),有老鼠…這個是…

S.TRANSL: 他的狗也 ,有老鼠…這個是…

TRANSL.notes: His dog is also (falling down), as well as the mouse…, what is this?

S.TRANSL: His dog is also , as well as the mouse…, what is this?

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani nizi tauRuan na siRmuq a sunis a zau nani tmibuqti pasazi tazanzanuman.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani niz~ri tauʁuan na siʁmuq a sunis a z~rau nani tmiβuqti pasaz~ri taz~ranz~ranuman.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani nizi tauRuan na siRmuq a sunis a zau nani tmibuqti pasazi tazanzanuman.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani niz~ri tauʁuan na siʁmuq a sunis a z~rau nani tmiβuqti pasaz~ri taz~ranz~ranuman.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,小孩從鹿的頭上掉到水裡.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), the child has fallen off from the head of the deer into the water.

S.TRANSL: At this point , the child has fallen off from the head of the deer into the water.

S.FORM: pasyababawti ya zapanna.
S.PHON: pasjaβaβawti ja z~rapanna.
S.FORM: pasyababawti ya zapanna.
S.PHON: pasjaβaβawti ja z~rapanna.
S.TRANSL: 他的腳在上面.
His feet are up in the air.

S.FORM: wiyati ta teRaq na zanum a uRuna.
S.PHON: wijati ta təʁaq na z~ranum a uʁuna.
S.FORM: wiyati ta teRaq na zanum a uRuna.
S.PHON: wijati ta təʁaq na z~ranum a uʁuna.
S.TRANSL: 他的頭在水裡面.

TRANSL.notes: His head (plunges) into the water.

S.TRANSL: His head into the water.

S.FORM: masulun tu wasuna qaya tmibuq nani.
S.PHON: masurun tu wasuna qaja tmiβuq nani.
S.FORM: masulun tu wasuna qaya tmibuq nani.
S.PHON: masurun tu wasuna qaja tmiβuq nani.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗也一起掉下去.

TRANSL.notes: His dog also falls (into the water) together with (him).

S.TRANSL: His dog also falls together with .

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani mzukatti nizi tazanzanuman sunis a zau sRi wasuna.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani mz~rukatti niz~ri taz~ranz~ranuman sunis a z~rau sʁi wasuna.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani mzukatti nizi tazanzanuman sunis a zau sRi wasuna.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani mz~rukatti niz~ri taz~ranz~ranuman sunis a z~rau sʁi wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,小孩和狗從水裡出來了.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), the child as well as his dog has come out of the water.

S.TRANSL: At this point , the child as well as his dog has come out of the water.

S.FORM: tu uzungannati na sunis a zau ya wasuna mzukat nizi tazanzanuman.
S.PHON: tu uz~ruŋannati na sunis a z~rau ja wasuna mz~rukat niz~ri taz~ranz~ranuman.
S.FORM: tu uzungannati na sunis a zau ya wasuna mzukat nizi tazanzanuman.
S.PHON: tu uz~ruŋannati na sunis a z~rau ja wasuna mz~rukat niz~ri taz~ranz~ranuman.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩背著他的狗,從水裡出來.
And then the child comes out of the water, carrying his dog on his back.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani yauti ta yau mnanguy ya wasuna.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani jauti ta jau mnaŋuj ja wasuna.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani yauti ta yau mnanguy ya wasuna.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani jauti ta jau mnaŋuj ja wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,他的狗在游泳.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), his dog is in…, is swimming.

S.TRANSL: At this point , his dog is in…, is swimming.

S.FORM: yauti takinilan na paRin ya sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: jauti takiniran na paʁin ja sunis a z~rau nani.
S.FORM: yauti takinilan na paRin ya sunis a zau nani.
S.PHON: jauti takiniran na paʁin ja sunis a z~rau nani.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩在樹的旁邊.
This child is beside a tree.

S.FORM: yau ngil Ritunguz sayza ya wasu a zau nani LOWVOLUMEqalimekka naRin sikawma naRin smuniLOWVOLUME zinna na lazat na sunis a zau ya wasuna tu.
S.PHON: jau ŋir ʁituŋuz~r sajz~ra ja wasu a z~rau nani r*w**ruməqariməkka naʁin sikawma naʁin smunir*w**rumə z~rinna na raz~rat na sunis a z~rau ja wasuna tu.
S.FORM: yau ngil Ritunguz sayza ya wasu a zau nani LOWVOLUMEqalimekka naRin sikawma naRin smuniLOWVOLUME zinna na lazat na sunis a zau ya wasuna tu.
S.PHON: jau ŋir ʁituŋuz~r sajz~ra ja wasu a z~rau nani r*w**ruməqariməkka naʁin sikawma naʁin smunir*w**rumə z~rinna na raz~rat na sunis a z~rau ja wasuna tu.
S.TRANSL: 可能狗要叫,小孩就對他的狗說,安靜!不要說話,不要出聲.
Perhaps because the dog is about to bark, the man, the child says to his dog, "Be quiet! Don't talk! Don't make any sound."

S.FORM: mlimekti ya wasuna.
S.PHON: mriməkti ja wasuna.
S.FORM: mlimekti ya wasuna.
S.PHON: mriməkti ja wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗安靜了.
So his dog keeps quiet.

S.FORM: tu syazi tazian nani mzaqisti tu paRin.
S.PHON: tu sjaz~ri taz~rian nani mz~raqisti tu paʁin.
S.FORM: tu syazi tazian nani mzaqisti tu paRin.
S.PHON: tu sjaz~ri taz~rian nani mz~raqisti tu paʁin.

TRANSL.notes: 到了這邊,(他們)爬樹.

S.TRANSL: 到了這邊, 爬樹.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), (they are) climbing the tree.

S.TRANSL: At this point , climbing the tree.

S.FORM: ta babaw na paRin ya sunis a zau sRi wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: ta βaβaw na paʁin ja sunis a z~rau sʁi wasu ʔnaj.
S.FORM: ta babaw na paRin ya sunis a zau sRi wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: ta βaβaw na paʁin ja sunis a z~rau sʁi wasu ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩和那隻狗在樹上.
This child and that dog are on top of the tree.

S.FORM: maututi pasazi nani yau ta babaw na paRin sunis a yau atu wasu a yau nani taytaannati ya biyatna.
S.PHON: maututi pasaz~ri nani jau ta βaβaw na paʁin sunis a jau atu wasu a jau nani tajtaannati ja βijatna.
S.FORM: maututi pasazi nani yau ta babaw na paRin sunis a yau atu wasu a yau nani taytaannati ya biyatna.
S.PHON: maututi pasaz~ri nani jau ta βaβaw na paʁin sunis a jau atu wasu a jau nani tajtaannati ja βijatna.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,小孩和狗在樹上,他們看到他們的青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), when that child and that dog are on top of the tree, they see their frog.

S.TRANSL: At this point , when that child and that dog are on top of the tree, they see their frog.

S.FORM: ou yau a biatta tazian zinnati sayza na sunis a zau atu wasu a zau nani.
S.PHON: *u jau a βiatta taz~rian z~rinnati sajz~ra na sunis a z~rau atu wasu a z~rau nani.
S.FORM: ou yau a biatta tazian zinnati sayza na sunis a zau atu wasu a zau nani.
S.PHON: *u jau a βiatta taz~rian z~rinnati sajz~ra na sunis a z~rau atu wasu a z~rau nani.
S.TRANSL: "喔,我們的青蛙在這裡",小孩和狗可能這樣想.
"Oh, our frog is here," the child and the dog perhaps think so.

S.FORM: mlizaqti.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti.
S.FORM: mlizaqti.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)很高興.

S.TRANSL: 很高興.

TRANSL.notes: (They) feel happy.

S.TRANSL: feel happy.

S.FORM: syazi tazian ta tausiqan paRin nani yauti ya biat a yau qenalizaq na sunis a yau sayza nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian ta tausiqan paʁin nani jauti ja βiat a jau qənariz~raq na sunis a jau sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: syazi tazian ta tausiqan paRin nani yauti ya biat a yau qenalizaq na sunis a yau sayza nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian ta tausiqan paʁin nani jauti ja βiat a jau qənariz~raq na sunis a jau sajz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,在一棵樹上,青蛙出現了,小孩或許覺得很高興.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here) on one tree, the frogs show up, and that's perhaps (why) that child felt happy.

S.TRANSL: At this point on one tree, the frogs show up, and that's perhaps that child felt happy.

S.FORM: mlizaqti wasu a yau sRi sunis a yau tazian 'u.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti wasu a jau sʁi sunis a jau taz~rian ʔu.
S.FORM: mlizaqti wasu a yau sRi sunis a yau tazian 'u.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti wasu a jau sʁi sunis a jau taz~rian ʔu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗在這邊很高興.
The dog and the child is very happy right here.

S.FORM: syazi tazian nani yau a sunis a yau maRawti tu biat a yau ta babaw na paRin.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani jau a sunis a jau maʁawti tu βiat a jau ta βaβaw na paʁin.
S.FORM: syazi tazian nani yau a sunis a yau maRawti tu biat a yau ta babaw na paRin.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taz~rian nani jau a sunis a jau maʁawti tu βiat a jau ta βaβaw na paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 到了這邊,小孩望著在樹上的青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: At this point (when it comes here), that child is looking afar at those frogs on the tree.

S.TRANSL: At this point , that child is looking afar at those frogs on the tree.

S.FORM: yau ta babaw na paRin ya biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau ta βaβaw na paʁin ja βiat a jau nani.
S.FORM: yau ta babaw na paRin ya biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau ta βaβaw na paʁin ja βiat a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 樹上有青蛙.
There are frogs on the tree.

S.FORM: yau qmuRiRiz a sunis a zau tamamanayan sRi wasuna.
S.PHON: jau qmuʁiʁiz~r a sunis a z~rau tamamanajan sʁi wasuna.
S.FORM: yau qmuRiRiz a sunis a zau tamamanayan sRi wasuna.
S.PHON: jau qmuʁiʁiz~r a sunis a z~rau tamamanajan sʁi wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩坐在地上.
This child is sitting directly on the ground, along with his dog.

S.FORM: tu yauti 'e qmuni zinta snazau smani.
S.PHON: tu jauti ʔə qmuni z~rinta snaz~rau smani.
S.FORM: tu yauti 'e qmuni zinta snazau smani.
S.PHON: tu jauti ʔə qmuni z~rinta snaz~rau smani.
S.TRANSL: 有…ㄜ..我不知道我們怎麼說.
And then there are…, well, we don't know how to put this.

S.FORM: yau mlizaqti sayza ya sunis a zau tmayta tu biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau mriz~raqti sajz~ra ja sunis a z~rau tmajta tu βiat a jau nani.
S.FORM: yau mlizaqti sayza ya sunis a zau tmayta tu biat a yau nani.
S.PHON: jau mriz~raqti sajz~ra ja sunis a z~rau tmajta tu βiat a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 看到這些青蛙,小孩很高興.
Seeing those frogs, this child perhaps feels happy.

S.FORM: pasyababawti limana azuti pmiqpiq tu lima sayza.
S.PHON: pasjaβaβawti rimana az~ruti pmiqpiq tu rima sajz~ra.
S.FORM: pasyababawti limana azuti pmiqpiq tu lima sayza.
S.PHON: pasjaβaβawti rimana az~ruti pmiqpiq tu rima sajz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 他的手舉起來,可能好像在拍手.

TRANSL.notes: His hands are up in the air, like (he's) clapping his hands maybe.

S.TRANSL: His hands are up in the air, like clapping his hands maybe.

S.FORM: qenalizaqan tu pnakalaanna tu biyat a yau.
S.PHON: qənariz~raqan tu pnakaraanna tu βijat a jau.
S.FORM: qenalizaqan tu pnakalaanna tu biyat a yau.
S.PHON: qənariz~raqan tu pnakaraanna tu βijat a jau.
S.TRANSL: 他很高興他找到青蛙了.
He felt happy that he found out the frog.

S.FORM: ((VOICEOVERmaiti)).
S.PHON: ((**iʦə**əʁmaiti)).
S.FORM: ((VOICEOVERmaiti)).
S.PHON: ((**iʦə**əʁmaiti)).
S.TRANSL: 沒了嗎?
Is it over?

S.FORM: maiti haw.
S.PHON: maiti haw.
S.FORM: maiti haw.
S.PHON: maiti haw.
S.TRANSL: 沒了.
It's over.
